---
title: "Machine Learning Tabular Datasets"
format: html
---

## Dataset Repositories

- [UC Irvine Machine Learning Repostiroy](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/) (661 datasets) (or [Beta](https://archive-beta.ics.uci.edu/))
- [Open Data | Python for Data Science](https://www.python4data.science/en/latest/data-processing/opendata.html): A topic-based overview of public repositories containing research data.
- [Kaggle](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets?fileType=csv&minUsabilityRating=10.00&feedbackIds=14) (144 datasets. Filters: `CSV, Usability: 10.00, Highly-voted, Original`)
- HuggingFace:
    - **[Tabular Classification](https://huggingface.co/datasets?task_categories=task_categories:tabular-classification)** (5,266 datasets): Thousands of sets for credit scoring, churn, etc.
    - **[Tabular Regression](https://huggingface.co/datasets?task_categories=task_categories:tabular-regression)** (2,762 datasets): Housing, pricing, and sensor data.
- [PMLB](https://github.com/EpistasisLab/pmlb): A large, curated repository of benchmark datasets for evaluating supervised machine learning algorithms. Provides classification and regression datasets in a standardized format that are accessible through a Python API.
- [U.S. Government open data](https://catalog.data.gov/?sort=popularity) (524,718 datasets): Here you will find data, tools, and resources to conduct research, develop web and mobile applications, design data visualizations, and more.
- [UK Governement open data](https://data.gov.uk/)
- [EU open data](http://data.europa.eu/euodp/en/data/)
- [A very long list from Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/bernardmarr/2016/02/12/big-data-35-brilliant-and-free-data-sources-for-2016/)
- OpenML

## PyCaret Datasets

PyCaret can be downloaded with the [following code snippet](https://pycaret.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api/datasets.html) (needs internet connection):

```python
from pycaret.datasets import get_data

juice = get_data('juice')
```

| **Dataset**          | **Original Source**                  | **Description**                                                          | **License**                                                                              |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `anomaly`            | PyCaret Internal                     | Synthetic data generated for anomaly detection demonstrations.           | [MIT](https://opensource.org/license/mit/)                                               |
| `france` / `germany` | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Subsets of the "Online Retail" dataset (UK-based retailer transactions). | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `bank`               | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Bank Marketing data regarding phone-based term deposit campaigns.        | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `blood`              | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Donor history from the Blood Transfusion Service Center (Taiwan).        | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `cancer`             | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Breast Cancer Wisconsin (Diagnostic) dataset using FNA image features.   | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `credit`             | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | "Default of Credit Card Clients" from a bank in Taiwan.                  | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `diabetes`           | UCI / National Institute of Diabetes | Pima Indians Diabetes data for predicting onset in females.              | [Public Domain](https://opendatacommons.org/licenses/pddl/1-0/)                          |
| `electrical_grid`    | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Simulated stability data of a 4-node star electrical grid.               | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `employee`           | IBM HR Analytics (via Kaggle)        | Fictional data used to predict employee attrition and performance.       | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)                            |
| `heart`              | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Heart Failure Clinical Records (survival data of 299 patients).          | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `heart_disease`      | UCI (Statlog)                        | Clinical attributes used to predict presence of heart disease.           | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `hepatitis`          | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Clinical and demographic features used to predict hepatitis survival.    | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `income`             | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | "Adult" census data used to predict if income exceeds $50K/yr.           | [Public Domain](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/)                                            |
| `juice`              | _ISLR_ (R package `ISLR`)            | Citrus Hill vs. Minute Maid purchase data from supermarket records.      | [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)                          |
| `nba`                | Kaggle (NBA Statistics)              | Performance stats of NBA rookies used to predict career longevity.       | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)                            |
| `wine`               | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Physicochemical properties of Portuguese "Vinho Verde" wines.            | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `telescope`          | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | MAGIC Gamma Telescope data simulating Cherenkov gamma pulses.            | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `titanic`            | Kaggle (Titanic Challenge)           | Passenger manifest data used to predict survival during the sinking.     | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)                            |
| `us_presidential...` | MIT Election Data                    | US County-level presidential election results and demographics.          | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `glass`              | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Chemical composition of glass types for forensic identification.         | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `iris`               | UCI (Fisher, 1936)                   | Classic dataset measuring dimensions of three iris flower species.       | [Public Domain](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/)                                            |
| `poker`              | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Five-card poker hands classified by rank (Pair, Flush, etc.).            | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `questions`          | TREC (NIST)                          | Question classification dataset (Entity, Human, Location, etc.).         | [Public Domain](https://trec.nist.gov/)                                                  |
| `satellite`          | UCI (Statlog)                        | Multispectral pixel values from Landsat satellite imagery.               | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `CTG`                | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Cardiotocography measurements for fetal health classification.           | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `asia_gdp`           | World Bank / Gapminder               | Economic and health indicators for various Asian nations.                | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `facebook`           | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Performance metrics of posts on a cosmetic brand's Facebook page.        | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `jewellery`          | PyCaret Internal                     | Synthetic customer data for jewelry store segmentation.                  | [MIT](https://opensource.org/license/mit/)                                               |
| `mice`               | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Protein expression levels in the brains of mice (Trisomy study).         | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `pokemon`            | Kaggle (Alberto Barradas)            | Stats (HP, Attack, etc.) for all Pokémon across generations.             | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)                            |
| `seeds`              | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | X-ray measurements of wheat kernels (Kama, Rosa, Canadian).              | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `wholesale`          | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Annual spending on product categories by wholesale clients.              | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `amazon`             | UCI / Julian McAuley                 | Customer reviews and ratings from Amazon product pages.                  | [Academic Use](https://www.google.com/search?q=https://mcauleylab.ucsd.edu/data/amazon/) |
| `kiva`               | Kiva.org (via Kaggle)                | Crowdfunding loan data including descriptions and sectors.               | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)                            |
| `spx`                | Yahoo Finance                        | Daily price and volume data for the S&P 500 index.                       | [Public Domain](https://finance.yahoo.com/)                                              |
| `wikipedia`          | Wikimedia Foundation                 | Text samples from Wikipedia articles used for NLP tasks.                 | [CC BY-SA 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/)                          |
| `automobile`         | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | 1985 auto specifications and insurance risk ratings.                     | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `bike`               | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Hourly/daily bike rental counts in the Capital Bikeshare system.         | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `boston`             | UCI / StatLib                        | Housing values and air quality in Boston suburbs (1970 census).          | [Public Domain](https://archive.ics.uci.edu/)                                            |
| `concrete`           | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Compressive strength based on mixture ingredients and age.               | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `diamond`            | ggplot2 (R package)                  | Prices and quality (4Cs) of nearly 54,000 diamonds.                      | [MIT](https://opensource.org/license/mit/)                                               |
| `energy`             | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Heating and cooling loads of buildings based on geometry.                | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `forest`             | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Burned area of forest fires in Portugal using weather data.              | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `insurance`          | Medical Cost (via Kaggle)            | Individual medical costs billed by health insurance.                     | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)                            |
| `parkinsons`         | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Vocal measurements used to track Parkinson's disease progression.        | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |
| `traffic`            | UCI Machine Learning Repository      | Interstate traffic volume and weather near Minneapolis-St Paul.          | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)                                |

## Description of Downloaded CSVs

These are in the `datasets/` folder:

| Dataset | Source | Description | License |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `advertising.csv` | *An Introduction to Statistical Learning* (ISLR) | Contains advertising budgets and sales data for a product across 200 markets. | [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/) (Educational Use) |
| `auto-mpg.csv` | UCI Machine Learning Repository | 1970s–1980s fuel consumption and vehicle attributes from StatLib. | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) |
| `blood_transfusion.csv` | UCI Machine Learning Repository | RFM model data used to predict blood donation probability in Taiwan. | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) |
| `bmi_and_life_expectancy.csv` | Gapminder Foundation | Country-level demographics mapping male BMI to life expectancy. | [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) |
| `california_housing.csv` | StatLib / Scikit-Learn | Housing and income metrics from the 1990 U.S. Census. | Public Domain (U.S. Government) |
| `house_prices.csv` | Ames Housing (Dean De Cock) | Comprehensive physical and geographical data for Iowa residential homes. | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/) (Public Domain) |

## List of Names of Datasets for ML (no links)

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research

### Financial

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Dow Jones Index|Weekly data of stocks from the first and second quarters of 2011.|Calculated values included such as percentage change and a lags.|750|Comma separated values|Classification, regression, [Time series](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Time_series "Time series")|2014|[[422]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-422)[[423]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-423)|M. Brown et al.|
|Statlog (Australian Credit Approval)|Credit card applications either accepted or rejected and attributes about the application.|Attribute names are removed as well as identifying information. Factors have been relabeled.|690|Comma separated values|Classification|1987|[[424]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-424)[[425]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-425)|R. Quinlan|
|eBay auction data|Auction data from various eBay.com objects over various length auctions|Contains all bids, bidderID, bid times, and opening prices.|~ 550|Text|Regression, classification|2012|[[426]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-426)[[427]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-427)|[G. Shmueli](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Galit_Shmueli "Galit Shmueli") et al.|
|Statlog (German Credit Data)|Binary credit classification into "good" or "bad" with many features|Various financial features of each person are given.|690|Text|Classification|1994|[[428]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-428)|H. Hofmann|
|Bank Marketing Dataset|Data from a large marketing campaign carried out by a large bank .|Many attributes of the clients contacted are given. If the client subscribed to the bank is also given.|45,211|Text|Classification|2012|[[429]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-429)[[430]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-430)|S. Moro et al.|
|Istanbul Stock Exchange Dataset|Several stock indexes tracked for almost two years.|None.|536|Text|Classification, regression|2013|[[431]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-431)[[432]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-432)|O. Akbilgic|
|Default of Credit Card Clients|Credit default data for Taiwanese creditors.|Various features about each account are given.|30,000|Text|Classification|2016|[[433]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-433)[[434]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-434)|I. Yeh|
|[StockNet](https://github.com/yumoxu/stocknet-dataset)|Stock movement prediction from tweets and historical stock prices|None||Text|NLP|2018|[[435]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-435)|Yumo Xu and Shay B. Cohen|

### Weather

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Cloud DataSet|Data about 1024 different clouds.|Image features extracted.|1024|Text|Classification, clustering|1989|[[436]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-436)|P. Collard|
|El Nino Dataset|Oceanographic and surface meteorological readings taken from a series of buoys positioned throughout the equatorial Pacific.|12 weather attributes are measured at each buoy.|178080|Text|Regression|1999|[[437]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-437)|[Pacific Marine Environmental Laboratory](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacific_Marine_Environmental_Laboratory "Pacific Marine Environmental Laboratory")|
|Greenhouse Gas Observing Network Dataset|Time-series of greenhouse gas concentrations at 2921 grid cells in California created using simulations of the weather.|None.|2921|Text|Regression|2015|[[438]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-438)|D. Lucas|
|Atmospheric CO2 from Continuous Air Samples at Mauna Loa Observatory|Continuous air samples in Hawaii, USA. 44 years of records.|None.|44 years|Text|Regression|2001|[[439]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-439)|[Mauna Loa Observatory](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mauna_Loa_Observatory "Mauna Loa Observatory")|
|Ionosphere Dataset|Radar data from the ionosphere. Task is to classify into good and bad radar returns.|Many radar features given.|351|Text|Classification|1989|[[288]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-Zhou,_Zhi-Hua_2004-288)[[440]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-440)|[Johns Hopkins University](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Johns_Hopkins_University "Johns Hopkins University")|
|Ozone Level Detection Dataset|Two ground ozone level datasets.|Many features given, including weather conditions at time of measurement.|2536|Text|Classification|2008|[[441]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-441)[[442]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-442)|K. Zhang et al.|

### Census

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Adult Dataset|Census data from 1994 containing demographic features of adults and their income.|Cleaned and anonymized.|48,842|Comma separated values|Classification|1996|[[443]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-443)|United States Census Bureau|
|Census-Income (KDD)|Weighted census data from the 1994 and 1995 [Current Population Surveys](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Current_population_survey_\(US\) "Current population survey (US)").|Split into training and test sets.|299,285|Comma separated values|Classification|2000|[[444]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-444)[[445]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-445)|[United States Census Bureau](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_States_Census_Bureau "United States Census Bureau")|
|IPUMS Census Database|Census data from the Los Angeles and Long Beach areas.|None|256,932|Text|Classification, regression|1999|[[446]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-446)|[IPUMS](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IPUMS "IPUMS")|
|US Census Data 1990|Partial data from 1990 US census.|Results randomized and useful attributes selected.|2,458,285|Text|Classification, regression|1990|[[447]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-447)|[United States Census Bureau](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_States_Census_Bureau "United States Census Bureau")|

### Transit

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Bike Sharing Dataset|Hourly and daily count of rental bikes in a large city.|Many features, including weather, length of trip, etc., are given.|17,389|Text|Regression|2013|[[448]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-448)[[449]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-449)|H. Fanaee-T|
|New York City Taxi Trip Data|Trip data for yellow and green taxis in New York City.|Gives pick up and drop off locations, fares, and other details of trips.|6 years|Text|Classification, clustering|2015|[[450]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-450)|[New York City Taxi and Limousine Commission](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/New_York_City_Taxi_and_Limousine_Commission "New York City Taxi and Limousine Commission")|
|Taxi Service Trajectory ECML PKDD|Trajectories of all taxis in a large city.|Many features given, including start and stop points.|1,710,671|Text|Clustering, causal-discovery|2015|[[451]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-451)[[452]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-452)|M. Ferreira et al.|
|METR-LA|Speed from loop detectors in the highway of Los Angeles County.|Average speed in 5 minutes timesteps.|7,094,304 from 207 sensors and 34,272 timesteps|Comma separated values|Regression, Forecasting|2014|[[453]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-453)|Jagadish et al.|
|PeMS|Speed, flow, occupancy and other metrics from loop detectors and other sensors in the freeway of the State of California, USA.|Metric usually aggregated via Average into 5 minutes timesteps.|39,000 individual detectors, each containing years of timeseries|Comma separated values|Regression, Forecasting, Nowcasting, Interpolation|(updated realtime)|[[454]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-454)|California Department of Transportation|

### Internet

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Webpages from Common Crawl 2012|Large collection of webpages and how they are connected via hyperlinks|None.|3.5B|Text|clustering, classification|2013|[[455]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-455)|V. Granville|
|Internet Advertisements Dataset|Dataset for predicting if a given image is an advertisement or not.|Features encode geometry of ads and phrases occurring in the URL.|3279|Text|Classification|1998|[[456]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-456)[[457]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-457)|N. Kushmerick|
|Internet Usage Dataset|General demographics of internet users.|None.|10,104|Text|Classification, clustering|1999|[[458]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-458)|D. Cook|
|URL Dataset|120 days of URL data from a large conference.|Many features of each URL are given.|2,396,130|Text|Classification|2009|[[459]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-459)[[460]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-460)|J. Ma|
|Phishing Websites Dataset|Dataset of phishing websites.|Many features of each site are given.|2456|Text|Classification|2015|[[461]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-461)|R. Mustafa et al.|
|Online Retail Dataset|Online transactions for a UK online retailer.|Details of each transaction given.|541,909|Text|Classification, clustering|2015|[[462]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-462)|D. Chen|
|Freebase Simple Topic Dump|Freebase is an online effort to structure all human knowledge.|Topics from Freebase have been extracted.|large|Text|Classification, clustering|2011|[[463]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-463)[[464]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-464)|[Freebase](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Freebase_\(database\) "Freebase (database)")|
|Farm Ads Dataset|The text of farm ads from websites. Binary approval or disapproval by content owners is given.|SVMlight sparse vectors of text words in ads calculated.|4143|Text|Classification|2011|[[465]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-465)[[466]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-466)|C. Masterharm et al.|
|[The Pile](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Pile_\(dataset\) "The Pile (dataset)")|Assembling several large datasets of diverse and unstructured texts|Various (removing HTML and JavaScript from websites, removing duplicated sentences)|825 GiB English text|JSON Lines[[467]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-The_Pile-467)[[468]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-468)|Natural Language Processing, Text Prediction|2021|[[469]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-469)[[467]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-The_Pile-467)|Gao et al.|
|OSCAR|Large collection of monolingual corpora extracted from web data (Common Crawl dumps) covering 150+ languages|Various (filtering, language classification, adult-content detection and other labelling)|3.4 TB English text, 1.4 TB Chinese text, 1.1 TB Russian text, 595 MB German text, 431 MB French text, and data for 150+ languages (figures for version 23.01)|JSON Lines[[470]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-OSCAR-470)|Natural Language Processing, Text Prediction|2021|[[471]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-471)[[472]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-472)|Ortiz Suarez, Abadji, Sagot et al.|
|OpenWebText|An open-source recreation of the WebText corpus. The text is web content extracted from URLs shared on Reddit with at least three upvotes.|Extracted non-HTML content, deduplicated, and tokenized.|8,013,769 Documents, 38GB|Text|Natural Language Processing, Text Prediction|2019|[[473]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-473)[[474]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-474)|A. Gokaslan, V. Cohen|
|ROOTS|A well-documented and representative multilingual dataset with the explicit goal of doing good for and by the people whose data was collected.|Extracted non-HTML content, cleaned out UI and ads, deduplicated, removed PII, and tokenized.|1.6 TB, 59 languages.|Parquet|Natural Language Processing, Text Prediction|2022|[[475]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-475)[[476]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-476)|H. Laurençon, L. Saulnier, T. Wang, C. Akiki, A. Villanova del Moral, T. Le Scao|

### Games

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Poker Hand Dataset|5 card hands from a standard 52 card deck.|Attributes of each hand are given, including the Poker hands formed by the cards it contains.|1,025,010|Text|Regression, classification|2007|[[477]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-477)|R. Cattral|
|Connect-4 Dataset|Contains all legal 8-ply positions in the game of connect-4 in which neither player has won yet, and in which the next move is not forced.|None.|67,557|Text|Classification|1995|[[478]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-478)|J. Tromp|
|Chess (King-Rook vs. King) Dataset|Endgame Database for White King and Rook against Black King.|None.|28,056|Text|Classification|1994|[[479]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-479)[[480]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-Q.J.R_1-480)|M. Bain et al.|
|Chess (King-Rook vs. King-Pawn) Dataset|King+Rook versus King+Pawn on a7.|None.|3196|Text|Classification|1989|[[481]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-481)|R. Holte|
|Tic-Tac-Toe Endgame Dataset|Binary classification for win conditions in tic-tac-toe.|None.|958|Text|Classification|1991|[[482]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-482)|D. Aha|

### Other multivariate

|Dataset name|Brief description|Preprocessing|Instances|Format|Default task|Created (updated)|Reference|Creator|
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|Housing Data Set|Median home values of Boston with associated home and neighborhood attributes.|None.|506|Text|Regression|1993|[[483]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-:5-483)|D. Harrison et al.|
|The Getty Vocabularies|structured terminology for art and other material culture, archival materials, visual surrogates, and bibliographic materials.|None.|large|Text|Classification|2015|[[484]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-484)|[Getty Center](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Getty_Center "Getty Center")|
|Yahoo! Front Page Today Module User Click Log|User click log for news articles displayed in the Featured Tab of the Today Module on Yahoo! Front Page.|Conjoint analysis with a bilinear model.|45,811,883 user visits|Text|Regression, clustering|2009|[[485]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-485)[[486]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-486)|Chu et al.|
|British Oceanographic Data Centre|Biological, chemical, physical and geophysical data for oceans. 22K variables tracked.|Various.|22K variables, many instances|Text|Regression, clustering|2015|[[487]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-487)|[British Oceanographic Data Centre](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/British_Oceanographic_Data_Centre "British Oceanographic Data Centre")|
|Congressional Voting Records Dataset|Voting data for all USA representatives on 16 issues.|Beyond the raw voting data, various other features are provided.|435|Text|Classification|1987|[[488]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-488)|J. Schlimmer|
|Entree Chicago Recommendation Dataset|Record of user interactions with Entree Chicago recommendation system.|Details of each user's usage of the app are recorded in detail.|50,672|Text|Regression, recommendation|2000|[[489]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-489)|R. Burke|
|Insurance Company Benchmark (COIL 2000)|Information on customers of an insurance company.|Many features of each customer and the services they use.|9,000|Text|Regression, classification|2000|[[490]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-490)[[491]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-491)|P. van der Putten|
|Nursery Dataset|Data from applicants to nursery schools.|Data about applicant's family and various other factors included.|12,960|Text|Classification|1997|[[492]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-492)[[493]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-493)|V. Rajkovic et al.|
|University Dataset|Data describing attributed of a large number of universities.|None.|285|Text|Clustering, classification|1988|[[494]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-494)|S. Sounders et al.|
|Blood Transfusion Service Center Dataset|Data from blood transfusion service center. Gives data on donors return rate, frequency, etc.|None.|748|Text|Classification|2008|[[495]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-495)[[496]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-496)|I. Yeh|
|Record Linkage Comparison Patterns Dataset|Large dataset of records. Task is to link relevant records together.|Blocking procedure applied to select only certain record pairs.|5,749,132|Text|Classification|2011|[[497]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-497)[[498]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-498)|[University of Mainz](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Mainz "University of Mainz")|
|Nomao Dataset|Nomao collects data about places from many different sources. Task is to detect items that describe the same place.|Duplicates labeled.|34,465|Text|Classification|2012|[[499]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-499)[[500]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-500)|Nomao Labs|
|Movie Dataset|Data for 10,000 movies.|Several features for each movie are given.|10,000|Text|Clustering, classification|1999|[[501]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-501)|G. Wiederhold|
|Open University Learning Analytics Dataset|Information about students and their interactions with a virtual learning environment.|None.|~ 30,000|Text|Classification, clustering, regression|2015|[[502]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-502)[[503]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-503)|J. Kuzilek et al.|
|Mobile phone records|Telecommunications activity and interactions|Aggregation per geographical grid cells and every 15 minutes.|large|Text|Classification, Clustering, Regression|2015|[[504]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_datasets_for_machine-learning_research#cite_note-BarlacchiDe_Nadai2015-504)|G. Barlacchi et al.|
